since_last: 35% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.56%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +2.80% · Gold -0.17% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 35% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.56%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.56%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +5.89%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +5.89%, MU +5.47%, LSCC +4.18%, VRT +4.11%, INTC +3.24%. Laggards: SPCX -4.24%, SAP -2.82%, GOOGL -2.25%, APP -2.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.24% at $177.15
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.24% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
